# Buildwise Media
> AI-powered marketing engines for service businesses

## What We Do
Buildwise Media builds done-for-you marketing systems for service businesses across North America. We handle website, content, ads, AI tools, and strategy — so business owners can focus on running their business, not their marketing.

## Service: Ascend
Full-service AI marketing engine. Includes custom website (90+ PageSpeed), content production, paid ads management (Meta + Google), AI business tools, strategy & analytics, and brand identity. Month-to-month, no long-term lock-in. Client owns all assets.

## Industries We Serve
- HVAC / Plumbing / Electrical
- Med Spas & Aesthetic Clinics
- Custom Home Builders & Remodelers
- Roofing
- Pest Control & Wildlife
- Luxury Landscaping & Hardscaping
- Custom Pools & Outdoor Living
- High-End Dental & Orthodontics
- Concrete & Flatwork

## Key Differentiators
- 71 documented processes
- 90+ PageSpeed on every site
- 8/10 quality threshold — content scored before publishing
- 6 types of schema markup on every page
- AI handles 85% of production, quality-gated at every step
- Month-to-month Client Services Agreement, 30-day cancel
- Client owns everything we build
